creator: roots_bg@yahoo.com
text:
I'm installing linux-firefox from ports in order to be able to use Adobe Macromedia Flash Player 9, then I install Macromedia Flash Player 9. And When I visit sites which are compiled for Macromedia Flash Player 9. I experience linux-firefox's Random Crashes. It's a pretty ugly bug IMHO since a lot of people would prefer FreeBSD as a Desktop system and the Modern Desktop needs Flash Player version 9. Hope the Bug would be catched and fixed soon.

Best Regards,
hip0

Fix: 

I don't know about a fix.
How-To-Repeat: install linux-firefox (Currently I'm running the latest 2.0.0.5. Install linux-flashplugin-9.0r48. Try opening some site compiled for flash player version 9, soon you'll experience a linux-firefox crash.
